steps.title: Simplify the left side
steps.content:
Rewrite the left side of the equation:
$$\frac{15x+35}{5}-\frac{s}{11}=3x+7-\frac{s}{11}$$

steps.title: Match the x terms
steps.content:
The right side is
$$r(x-7)=rx-7r$$
For infinitely many solutions, the $x$-coefficients must match, so $r=3$.

steps.title: Match the constants
steps.content:
Use $r=3$ and match constant terms:
$$7-\frac{s}{11}=-7(3)$$
$$7-\frac{s}{11}=-21$$
$$-\frac{s}{11}=-28$$
The answer is 308.
